Yahi ho 2026 PUBG MOBILE National Championship South Asia Finals ko antim adhyay. Kati din samma bhayeko intense battles pachi, sabai kura Day 2 ma aayera thamncha, jaha Top 16 teams afno sabai shakti diyera euta matra lakshya ko lagi ladchan: South Asia ko champion banna.

Pratyek match, pratyek elimination, ra pratyek rotation le yo teams ko bhagya nirdharit garnecha. Yo bela second chance chaina ‚Äď euta matra team sabai bhanda mathi uthnecha ra title claim garnecha.

Top 3 teams PMGO ma qualify hunechan.

Match Schedule
Finals: 2 Days | 16 ‚Äď 17 April
Time: From 17:50 (GMT +5:45) Daily onwards

Finalist Teams:
Hidden Leaf Esports
Abrupt Slayers
NEPX ESPORTS
3 Real Bros

snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk ūüßü‚Äć‚ôÄÔłŹ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards ūüĎĽ

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister‚Äôs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos‚ÄĒuntil he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace‚Äôs centuries-old legend.

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.‚Äā‚Äā

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don‚Äôt, it‚Äôs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth‚Äôs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom‚Äôs influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel‚Äôs most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

‚óĀ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ‚Ė∑ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn‚Äôt exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. ¬ß 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film‚Äôs genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

en.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
en.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth‚Äôs mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom‚Äôs influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel‚Äôs most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

‚óĀ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ‚Ė∑ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn‚Äôt exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. ¬ß 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film‚Äôs genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

id.title: Avengers: Doomsday - Trailer Pertama "Dewa Petir Terakhir" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
id.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr

Tonton 'Konsep Trailer Fan' untuk Avengers: Doomsday (2026) dari Marvel Studios (Informasi Lebih Lanjut Tentang Video Ini di Bawah!)

Avengers: Doomsday menandai peningkatan besar di alam semesta Marvel saat krisis global dan multiversal baru memaksa para pahlawan terkuat Bumi ke dalam pertempuran paling berbahaya mereka. Dengan realitas itu sendiri yang mulai retak, munculnya Doctor Doom memperkenalkan ancaman yang didefinisikan oleh kecerdasan, ketelitian, dan ambisi absolut. Trailer ini menampilkan nuansa yang lebih gelap, memperlihatkan kehancuran skala besar, dunia yang runtuh, dan para pahlawan yang berjuang untuk mempertahankan kendali dalam lingkungan yang semakin tidak stabil. Saat karakter baru dan lama berkumpul, garis antara bertahan hidup dan kekalahan menjadi lebih tipis dari sebelumnya.

Kisah ini mengeksplorasi masa depan di mana kekuatan saja mungkin tidak cukup untuk menghentikan apa yang akan datang, karena pengaruh Doom menyebar melalui strategi, teknologi, dan manipulasi di berbagai realitas. Avengers harus menghadapi bukan hanya musuh yang kuat, tetapi juga konsekuensi dari alam semesta yang sudah mencapai batasnya. Aliansi diuji, kepemimpinan ditantang, dan setiap keputusan memiliki bobot yang melampaui satu garis waktu. Dengan rangkaian aksi besar-besaran, taruhan emosional yang tinggi, dan potensi crossover yang kuat, Avengers: Doomsday berdiri sebagai salah satu proyek Marvel yang paling ambisius, berpusat pada keruntuhan, perlawanan, dan perjuangan untuk melindungi masa depan multiverse.

Penyuntingan, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail oleh @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Perangkat lunak yang saya gunakan: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

‚óĀ Di saluran kami, kami membuat trailer mashup ‚Ė∑ Trailer mashup, juga dikenal sebagai trailer recut, dibuat dengan mengumpulkan berbagai cuplikan film dari satu atau lebih film dan menyuntingnya kembali untuk membentuk trailer baru. Mashup ini sering menggambarkan film yang tidak ada atau mengubah genre film yang sudah ada. Sebagai karya turunan yang didefinisikan berdasarkan Undang-Undang Hak Cipta Amerika Serikat 17 U.S.C. ¬ß 101, karya-karya ini dapat dilindungi dari klaim hak cipta berdasarkan doktrin penggunaan wajar.

Mashup trailer bukan hanya bentuk kreativitas digital yang dihasilkan pengguna, tetapi juga cara unik untuk membangun antusiasme terhadap rilis mendatang, melengkapi trailer film resmi. Sementara trailer tradisional menggoda plot dan menghasilkan hype, mashup buatan penggemar memungkinkan penonton untuk memberikan sentuhan sinematik mereka sendiri pada cuplikan yang sudah ada. Kebebasan kreatif ini dapat menyoroti aktor tertentu, menekankan alur cerita tertentu, atau bahkan mengubah genre film sepenuhnya.

Video ini adalah parodi. Karena sifatnya yang turunan dan transformatif, video ini dilindungi berdasarkan Penggunaan Wajar.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Terima Kasih Banyak Telah Menonton!

Semoga kekuatan selalu menyertai kita!

Avengers : Doomsday marque un tournant majeur dans l'univers Marvel. Avec des sc√®nes d'action spectaculaires, une forte charge √©motionnelle et un potentiel de crossover important, Avengers : Doomsday s'impose comme l'un des projets les plus ambitieux de Marvel, centr√© sur l'effondrement, la r√©sistance et la lutte pour prot√©ger l'avenir du multivers.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Logiciels utilis√©s : Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5

‚óĀ Sur notre cha√ģne, nous cr√©ons des mashups de bandes-annonces ‚Ė∑ Les mashups de bandes-annonces, aussi appel√©s bandes-annonces remani√©es, sont r√©alis√©s en assemblant des extraits de films issus d'un ou plusieurs longs m√©trages et en les remontant pour cr√©er une toute nouvelle bande-annonce. Les mashups de bandes-annonces ne sont pas seulement une forme de cr√©ativit√© num√©rique g√©n√©r√©e par les utilisateurs, mais aussi un moyen original de susciter l'enthousiasme autour des sorties √† venir, en compl√©ment des bandes-annonces officielles. it.description:

Avengers: Doomsday segna una svolta decisiva nell'universo Marvel, con una nuova crisi globale e multiversale che costringe i pi√Ļ potenti eroi della Terra ad affrontare la battaglia pi√Ļ pericolosa di sempre. Con la realt√† stessa che inizia a frammentarsi, l'emergere del Dottor Destino introduce una minaccia definita da intelligenza, precisione e ambizione assoluta. Il trailer adotta un tono pi√Ļ cupo, mostrando distruzione su vasta scala, mondi che collassano ed eroi che lottano per mantenere il controllo in un ambiente sempre pi√Ļ instabile. Mentre personaggi nuovi e di ritorno si uniscono, il confine tra sopravvivenza e sconfitta si fa pi√Ļ sottile che mai.

La storia esplora un futuro in cui il solo potere potrebbe non bastare a fermare ci√≤ che sta arrivando, poich√© l'influenza di Destino si diffonde attraverso strategia, tecnologia e manipolazione in molteplici realt√†. Gli Avengers devono affrontare non solo un nemico potente, ma anche le conseguenze di un universo gi√† spinto al limite. Le alleanze vengono messe alla prova, la leadership √® sfidata e ogni decisione ha un peso che va ben oltre una singola linea temporale. Con sequenze d'azione spettacolari, una forte carica emotiva e un grande potenziale di crossover, Avengers: Doomsday si conferma come uno dei progetti pi√Ļ ambiziosi della Marvel, incentrato sul collasso, la resistenza e la lotta per proteggere il futuro del multiverso.

Montaggio, effetti visivi, effetti sonori, miniatura a cura di @GalacticTrailerOfficial

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

‚óĀ Sul nostro canale creiamo mashup di trailer ‚Ė∑ I mashup di trailer, noti anche come trailer rimontati, sono realizzati raccogliendo diverse sequenze video da uno o pi√Ļ film e rimontandole per creare un trailer completamente nuovo. Questi mashup spesso raffigurano un film inesistente o ne modificano il genere. Essendo opere derivate, come definite dalla legge statunitense sul diritto d'autore (17 U.S.C. ¬ß 101), possono essere protetti da rivendicazioni di copyright in base alla dottrina del "fair use" (uso lecito).

I mashup di trailer non sono solo una forma di creativit√† digitale generata dagli utenti, ma anche un modo unico per creare attesa per le prossime uscite, integrando i trailer ufficiali. Mentre i trailer tradizionali anticipano la trama e generano clamore, i mashup realizzati dai fan permettono al pubblico di dare la propria interpretazione cinematografica al materiale esistente. Questa libert√† creativa pu√≤ mettere in risalto un particolare attore, enfatizzare una specifica trama o persino trasformare completamente il genere del film.

snippet.title: ST MAN - KALI KALI FT. YUNG 22 & BIG NORZZA ( OFFICAL MUSIC VIDEO )
snippet.description:
Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :
‚ěü Performed By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
‚ěü Music Produced By - St Man
‚ěü Background scoring - St Man
‚ěü Lyrics By - St Man, Yung 22 & Big Norzza
‚ěü Female singer - Somea Baraili
‚ěü Composed By - St Man & Yung 22
‚ěü Sarangi - Hemanta Kancha Rasaily
‚ěü Mix & Master By 8ugustus

Video Credits : Matte studio
‚ěü Director : Thomas GM

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

‚úĖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

‚úĖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

ūüé§  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee: Song from Coachella 2026

Check Out the Coachella 2026 Rap/Hip-Hop, R&B Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg2x_V0qn2yoXAThIirv3AHI_R5Ngazct

‚≠źFollow Afterglow:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
ūüĒī Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

‚≠źFrench Montana:
https://www.instagram.com/frenchmontana/

Lyrics:

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out, Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' shit you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it (Skrrt)

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi (Ow)

[Pre-Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm fucked up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peeped you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A fucking good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink, but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do (Oh)
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you, alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to me, 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose (Ooh)
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 ūüŹĻ
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.

snippet.title: KITAB (Official Music video) | Mr Dutt ft Vipin Foji | Tanu Rawat | New Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened.  join Mr Dutt  for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song KITAB
MAKE YOUR REELS : https://url-shortener.me/I440


Listen on : 
Spotify : https://url-shortener.me/I43P



AUDIO CREDITS:
SONG : KITAB 
SINGER : MR DUTT FT VIPIN FOJI
LYRICS & COMPOSE : VARUN GARHWALA , MR DUTT
MUSIC & MISX MASTER : MR DUTT

 FEMALE LEAD : TANU RAWAT 
REEL PROMOTIONS: SHARP MEDIA

YT Promotion - BIGMedia 

Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer
1st Ad - Jass
Editor - cutsbynav
Colorist - Fateh Sidhu
Vfx - Gags 3D
Female lead - Tanu Rawat
Production Head = Kainth Production (Gagan)
Production ad = Ravi Birla
Himachal production- Sunny 
Makeup = Komal Makeover
Hair = Sunny Lakhanpal
Still = J singh
Spot Team - Ram and Team

Tanu Rawat Team 
Anjali Rawat and Team

Transport - Nijjar Group
Art - Karma 
Costume - Rajat Manchanda
Costume Ad - Neha and Fahem

lyrics : 
Tane Mai Likhu Rani Dil Ki 
Ya Tane Mumtaj Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai beth Gya Tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Re Hottha Na Gulab Likh Diyu 
Re Akhya Ne Sharab Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga
Chunni Mai Jo Moti Jadre Usne Chhori Tara Likhu 
Chand Fika Lagge Se Yo Rup Kitna Pyara Lilkhu 
Ram Ka ishara Likhu Dekhya Na Nazara Likhhu Bat Chhoti Lage Meri Kaat Ke dubara Likkhu 
Re Battan Ne Alap Likhunga 
Jo dikhja Tu Khaab Likhunga 
Je likhne Mai Beth Gya tane 
To Pakka Mai Kitab Likhunga 

Ho Pucche na Tu Mere Te Ya Ashiq ka Haal Resham Te Jyada Hai Sunehre Tere Baal 
Ho Pariya Ke desh Te Tu Aayi Vissa Dalke 
Red Moon Jisi E Tu lage Se Kamal 
Can‚Äôt lu Without You You Baby Mine 
If You Touch Me So am Feeling Fine 
Likhu Tere Bare Saari Duniya Ke Bol Laau 
Likhu Tere Bare Sari Duniya Ne Bhul Jau 
Likkhu Tere Bare fir Kuch Or Na Mai Likh Pau 
Tod ke Kalam Fir Fanshi Pe Mai Jhul Jaau 

Tanne Mai Meri Radha Likh Diyu 
Maine Mai Ghanshyam Likhunga 
Je Likhne Mai Beth Gya Tane 
To Pkka Mai Kitab Likhunga 
Tanne Mai likhhu Rani Dil ki


#kitab #mrdutt

snippet.title: Arijit Singh - Zaalima | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Love Song
snippet.description:
Song - Zaalima
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De‚Ä¶
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De‚Ä¶

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ‚ö†ÔłŹ
This summer just got HOTTERūüĒ•

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

ūüéß Song Credits 

‚ěü Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
‚ěü Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
‚ěü Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
‚ěü Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
‚ěü Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2‚Äč, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

ūüé¨ Video Credits

‚ěü Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
‚ěü Directed By: Homi Adajania 
‚ěü Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
‚ěü Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
‚ěü Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

‚ěü Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
‚ěü Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
‚ěü Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
‚ěü Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
‚ěü Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:


(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) √ó4

Hai thoda besura par dil mein taal hai
Isko hum naachne se
tokein kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) √ó4

Nachchaan aaj main shukar mana ke
Sone yaar tonh nazrein mila ke
Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

(Main Naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) √ó4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) √ó4

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain 
Shole kab talak

(Main naachun tab talak
Tu bole jab talak) √ó2

Tu bole jab talak) √ó4

Mainu lor kise di koi na
saare jag di laaj bhula ke

Chal mood banake sufi
Thodi kar lein bewakoofi
Choolhe mein jaaye mitra
Duniya bhar ki masroofi

Pairon ko par lagne se rokeon kab talak

Tu bole jab talak) √ó4


ANTARA

Ve raanjha aag hai jitni idhar lagi
Tu bhi maan le dugni udhar lagi

Dono dil hi barabar jhulas gaye 
Pher.. jaan de kitni kidhar lagi

Ajj yaar de karke sadqe 
Maine pyale pyale gatke
Chal dekhein dil patri se
Aakhir kab tak na bhatke

Denge bhi ik dooje ko dhokhe kab talak..

Behki jawaniyaan jaise barood hain
Dekhein uthte nahin hain

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

id.title: Aku Membuka Kebun Binatang, Tapi Hewan-Hewan Itu Menggunakan Suaraku...
id.description:
Hari ini aku membuka kebun binatang, tapi hewan-hewannya menggunakan suaraku. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

Merchandise: https://foltyn.shop/

Gabung ke channel ini untuk mendapatkan akses ke keuntungan:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Sean Kingston, Justin Bieber - Eenie Meenie (Lyrics)

Sean Kingston, Justin Bieber - Eenie Meenie (Lyrics)

ūüĆ∂ÔłŹLyrics:

[Intro: Sean Kingston]
Eenie-meenie-miney-mo
Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, if, if
If she holla, let her go

[Verse 1: Sean Kingston]
She's indecisive, she can't decide
She keeps on lookin' from left to right
Girl, come a bit closer, look in my eyes
Searchin' is so wrong, I'm Mr. Right

[Pre-Chorus: Sean Kingston]
You seem like the type to love 'em and leave 'em
And disappear right after the song
So give me the night to show you, hold you
Don't leave me out here dancin' alone

You can't make up your mind, mind, mind, mind, mind

'Cause shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover

Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, oh

Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover
Shawty is a eenie-meenie-miney-mo lover, woah, oh

Catch a bad chick by her toe
If she holla, if, if
If she holla, let her go (Here we go! Hey)
Eenie-meenie-miney-mo

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises

The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash

It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

snippet.description:
ūüĎĎ Lauv - I Like Me Better (Lyrics)

Lyrics for "Lauv - I Like Me Better"

[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee, burning through the hours talking
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is but I got that feeling
Waking up in this bed next to you swear the room, yeah, it got no ceiling
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talking, I might have to tell you something
Damn

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile
Stay here with me
Lay here with me, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (yes I do, yes I do, babe)
I like me better when I'm with you (oooh noo)
I knew from the first time, I'd stay for a long time, 'cause
I like me better when, I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh noo)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó=√ó
